---
title: ButtonsBuildUp
subtitle: "Elaboration Ladder"
---

> Buttons from Naked to Bootstrap styling

> Make OJS Inputs and Reactive Restyling !

<form class="oi-3a86ea"><button class="btn btn-warning">Store</button></form>

<button class="btn btn-success">Store</button>

&lt;form class="oi-3a86ea"&gt;&lt;button class="btn btn-warning"&gt;Store&lt;/button&gt;&lt;/form&gt;


### HTML Buttons Naked (no-attributes, no-styling)

<label for="h-in">HTML Input:</label>
<input type="text" id="h-in">
<button id="h-btn">HTML Button</button>

### HTML Buttons with .btn.btn-primary (yields Bootstrap styling)

<div style="display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:0.5rem;">

  <button class="btn btn-primary">Primary</button>
  <button class="btn btn-secondary">Secondary</button>
  <button class="btn btn-success">Success</button>
  <button class="btn btn-danger">Danger</button>
  <button class="btn btn-warning">Warning</button>
  <button class="btn btn-info">Info</button>
  <button class="btn btn-light">Light</button>
  <button class="btn btn-dark">Dark</button>
  <button class="btn btn-link">Link</button>

</div>

<p>HTML Output: <span id="h-out">_placeholder output area_</span></p>

### OJS Input.button

```{ojs}
viewof myButton = Inputs.button("Clip");
```

```{ojs}
viewof styledBtn = {
  const btn = Inputs.button("Submit");
  // Find the button element inside the generated div and add classes
//  const inputElement = btn.querySelector("button");
//  inputElement.classList.add("btn", "btn-success", "btn-lg"); 
  return btn;
}

viewof styledBtn2 = Inputs.button("Submit");
```

```{ojs}
restyling = {
  // Very Great Restyling Side Effects
  const mib = viewof styledBtn2.querySelector('button.btn-quarto');
  if (mib) {
    mib.classList.remove('btn-quarto');
    mib.classList.add("btn", "btn-success", "btn-lg"); 
  }
};


```
